name: Thunder Fetch
description: Bark Blast + Fetch: the ball comes back with the storm.

name: Slip 'n' Blitz
description: Zoomies + Slobber Shot: leave a slick, punishing wake.

name: Wildcat Cyclone
description: Pounce Slash + Claw Flurry: become the blender.

name: Tangle Storm
description: Hairball Lob + Yarn Whip: everything gets tangled.

name: Seismic Kick
description: Scissor Kick + Thumper Quake: kick so hard the ground answers.

name: Clover Cascade
description: Lucky Clover + Bunny Barrage: luck rains sideways.

name: Glowhive
description: Bee Swarm + Firefly Lantern: the hive lights up.

name: Cannonade
description: Tennis Ball + Acorn Mortar: serve, lob, repeat.
